chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 483 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.2898/2023 (Ex./A) 3. For orders on CMA No.2899/2023 (I Rule 10) 4. For hearing of CMA No.2057/2023 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case 16.11.2023 Mr. Nizamuddin Noonari, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for intervenors. Mr. Sanwan Khan Jagirani, Advocate for respondent No.4 along with Syed Zaman Ali Shah, Assistant Executive Engineer, Nara Lift Irrigation, Sub-Division Khairpur. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- At the very outset, learned Counsel for intervenors withdraws the application under Order I Rule 10 CPC, and submits that he will file a fresh petition for petitioners’ grievances. Accordingly, the same is disposed of. Learned Counsel for petitioner submits that since the water for irrigation purpose has been provided to the lands of the petitioner, he is satisfied and does not press this petition, which is accordingly disposed of along with pending application(s). However, the Irrigation officials are directed to act in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
